    Methods in neqsim.util.nucleation that return ClassicalNucleationTheory
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static ClassicalNucleationTheory
    ClassicalNucleationTheory.fromThermoSystem(SystemInterface system, String componentName)
    Creates a CNT model from a NeqSim thermodynamic system for a specified condensable component.
    ClassicalNucleationTheory
    MulticomponentNucleation.getPseudocomponentCNT()
    Returns the pseudocomponent CNT model (PSEUDOCOMPONENT mode only).
    static ClassicalNucleationTheory
    ClassicalNucleationTheory.naphthalene()
    Creates a CNT model for naphthalene (C10H8) solid deposition.
    static ClassicalNucleationTheory
    ClassicalNucleationTheory.paraffinWax()
    Creates a CNT model for a generic n-paraffin wax (e.g., C25H52 for wax nucleation).
    static ClassicalNucleationTheory
    ClassicalNucleationTheory.sulfurS8()
    Creates a CNT model for elemental sulfur S8.
    static ClassicalNucleationTheory
    ClassicalNucleationTheory.waterIce()
    Creates a CNT model for water (ice nucleation from vapor).
    Constructors in neqsim.util.nucleation with parameters of type ClassicalNucleationTheory
    Modifier
    Constructor
    Description
     
    PopulationBalanceModel(ClassicalNucleationTheory cnt)
    Creates a PopulationBalanceModel using nucleation parameters from a ClassicalNucleationTheory model.
